해당 전공 분야 석사 이상, 또는 학사 + 1년 이상 관련 경력. (단,: Master's degree or higher in relevant major, or Bachelor's + 1 year relevant experience. (Extensive Exemption: International students with a domestic Associate's or irrelevant domestic Bachelor's degree are completely exempt from the 1-year experience requirement.)
전년도 한국은행 발표 1인당 GNI(국민총소득)의 80% 이상 요건 의무: Mandatory requirement of 80% or more of the previous year's GNI per capita announced by the Bank of Korea. (Special exemption of 70% applicable for designated ventures / non-metropolitan mid-sized companies.)
로펌 및 법률 사무소 등. (국민고용보호 심사제도 비적용 대상): Law firms and legal offices, etc. (Exempt from National Employment Protection Review)

투자 및 신용 분석가, 자산 운용가, 보험/금융상품 개발자, 증권/외환딜: Investment/Credit Analyst, Asset Manager, Insurance/Financial Product Developer, Securities/FX Dealer
